name: Tongfang Kontafarma Holdings Limited
summary: Tongfang Kontafarma Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the manufacture and sale of cement, clinker, and slag in the People's Republic of China. It operates through Medical, and Pharmaceutical and Health Business; Fitness Business; and Cement Business segments. The company also manufactures and sales prescription drugs and laboratory related products; operates fitness centers under the True Fitness and True Yoga brands; operates in the franchise business; and provides consultation services for fitness and health activities. In addition, it trades in cement and clinker, and laboratory related products; researches and develops medical products; and offers corporate advisory and energy contracting services. The company was formerly known as Allied Cement Holdings Limited and changed its name to Tongfang Kontafarma Holdings Limited in August 2016. The company was incorporated in 2011 and is headquartered in Wanchai, Hong Kong. Tongfang Kontafarma Holdings Limited is a subsidiary of China Health Management Investment Limited.
